mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.campus_id, p.visibility, p.poi_name, p.is_top, p.status, p.created_at,
-- 用户信息 u.id as user_id, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar_url as user_avatar_url, u.gender as user_gender, u.campus_id as user_campus_id, u.is_real_name as user_is_real_name, u.created_at as user_created_at,
-- 统计信息（从post_stats表获取） COALESCE(ps.view_cnt, 0) as view_cnt, COALESCE(ps.like_cnt, 0) as like_cnt, COALESCE(ps.comment_cnt, 0) as comment_cnt, COALESCE(ps.share_cnt, 0) as share_cnt, COALESCE(ps.fav_cnt, 0) as fav_cnt,
-- 用户操作状态 CASE WHEN user_like.item_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_liked, CASE WHEN user_fav.item_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_favorited
FROM posts p INNER JOIN topic_posts tp ON p.id = tp.post_id LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_stats ps ON p.id = ps.post_id
-- 当前用户点赞状态
LEFT JOIN likes user_like ON p.id = user_like.item_id AND user_like.item_type = 'POST' AND user_like.user_id = #{currentUserId}
-- 当前用户收藏状态
LEFT JOIN favorites user_fav ON p.id = user_fav.item_id AND user_fav.item_type = 'POST' AND user_fav.user_id = #{currentUserId}
WHERE tp.topic_id = #{topicId} AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED'
ORDER BY COALESCE(ps.like_cnt, 0) DESC, p.created_at DESC
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE topics SET post_cnt = GREATEST(0, COALESCE(post_cnt, 0) + #{increment}) WHERE id IN
#{topicId}
